title: Error due to legacy expression syntax in AI agent workflow
symptom: The workflow fails when connecting the 'Postgres Chat Memory' to 'set_params', indicating an issue with the expression syntax used for sessionId.
applies_when: Using AI agent with Postgres Chat Memory
not_this_if: All expressions are using the current standard syntax
root_cause: The error occurs because the user is utilizing an outdated expression syntax for referencing node data. n8n has transitioned to a new syntax that must be used to ensure proper data mapping and functionality.
fix_steps: Identify all nodes using the legacy syntax in the workflow
Update the syntax to the current standard format, e.g., use `{{ $('set_params').item.json.sessionId }}`
Test the workflow again to ensure it executes without errors
agent_instruction: Update all legacy expression syntax in your workflow to the current standard syntax.
